ai-architect-blender-stdio.description: AI Architect - Blender 3D house generation via stdio (for ChatGPT desktop)

ai-architect-blender-http.description: AI Architect - Blender 3D house generation via HTTP (for API clients)

instructions.name: AI Architect Blender Tools
instructions.description: Generate 3D architectural models from text prompts using Blender. The AI Architect system creates house designs with rooms, walls, doors, windows, and roofs.
capabilities: Generate complete house models from scene graph descriptions
Create individual rooms with proper dimensions
Export to GLB format for web viewing
Apply architectural styles (modern, villa, colonial, etc.)

tools.name: generate_house
tools.description: Generate a complete 3D house model from a scene graph

scene_graph.description: Scene graph containing house layout with rooms

style.description: Architectural style (modern, villa, colonial, contemporary, craftsman)

tools.name: create_room
tools.description: Create an individual room in the scene

room_name.description: Name of the room to create

tools.name: create_roof
tools.description: Add a roof to the house

tools.name: export_glb
tools.description: Export the current scene to GLB format
